creator: karl@denninger.net
text:
(In reply to karl from comment #57)

OBE - Whatever has been committed up to today has fixed it -- but not sure exactly WHEN it got fixed or by which commit.

Compiled with:
FREEBSD_WORLD_EXTRA_ARGS="-DWITHOUT_DEBUG_FILES -DWITHOUT_KERNEL_SYMBOLS -DWITHO
UT_TESTS"

Which ALWAYS reliably produced crashes during compilation, but no longer does.  Build number that does NOT exhibit the problem below.

root@rpi:/data/HD-MCP # make clean
rm -f *.o hd-mcp hd-mcp.freeware license-server hd-commit
root@rpi:/data/HD-MCP # make
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c config.c -o config.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c funcs.c -o funcs.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c hd-mcp.c -o hd-mcp.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c www.c -o www.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c slave.c -o slave.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c amcrest.c -o amcrest.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c license.c -o license.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c z-wave.c -o z-wave.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c malloc.c -o malloc.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c S0-encryption.c -o S0-encryption.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c S0-mac.c -o S0-mac.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c boot-include.c -o boot-include.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c root-include.c -o root-include.o
cc -g -o hd-mcp hd-mcp.o www.o config.o slave.o amcrest.o license.o funcs.o z-wave.o malloc.o S0-encryption.o S0-mac.o root-include.o boot-include.o -lm -lcrypt -lssl -lpthread -lcrypto -lgpio
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c hd-commit.c -o hd-commit.o
cc -g -o hd-commit hd-commit.o
cc  -g -Wstrict-prototypes -DVERSION=\"8.1.0-LocalAuth\" -c license-server.c -o license-server.o
cc -g -o license-server license-server.o funcs.o malloc.o -lcrypto -lssl -lm
root@rpi:/data/HD-MCP #

FreeBSD 14.2-STABLE stable/14-n269559-92a9501b6be3 GENERIC
